[Graph | +elems()   : List<GraphElem<V, E>>
             ; +vertices(): List<Vertex<V>>
             ; +edges()   : List<Edge<E>>]

[GraphElem]^-[GVertex]
[GraphElem]^-[GEdge]

[Vertex  | +get() : T
            ; +children() : List<Vertex<V>>]
[Edge | +get()  : E
            ; +left() : Vertex<V>
            ; +right(): Vertex<V>]


[Graph]^-----[CDGraph]
[GraphElem]^-[CDElem]

[CDNode]^-[Package | +name():Name]
[CDNode]
^---[Interface | +name():Type; +methods():List<Method>]
    [Interface]
    ^---[Class | +fields():List<Field>]
[CDNode]^-[Note]

[CDEdge]^-[Association]
[CDEdge]^-[Aggregation]
[CDEdge]^-[Composition]
[CDEdge]^-[Inheritance]

[Field  | +visibility() : Visibility; +name() : Name; +type(): Type]
[Field]^--[Method | +param() : List<Param>]

[Visibility]^-[NotSpecified]
[Visibility]^-[Default]
[Visibility]^-[Private]
[Visibility]^-[Package]
[Visibility]^-[Public]

[Param | +name():Name; +type():Type]
[String]^-[Name]
[Type]^-[Simple  | +name() : Name]


[ImportModule| +imprt(input : I) : G]


[ImportModule]
^--[ClassDiagramParser | +imprt(input : String) : CDGraph]



[ParserFascade | +parse(p:Parser<T>, in:String) : T
                  ; +parsers():Map<String, Parser<T>>]
[Parser]^--[Parsec]

[LanguageDef]^-[DiagramDef]



[ExportModule|+exprt(graph : G) : O]

[ExportModule]
^--[SimpleCodeGenerator]
[ExportModule]
^--[ProjektCodeGenerator]

[SimpleCodeGenerator]
^--[ClassDiagramToDot]
[ExportModule]
^--[ProjektCodeGenerator]



[Metric | +evaluate(graph : G) : M]
[Metric]^--[GenericMetric]

[GenericMetric]
^--[MaxDegreeMetric]
[GenericMetric]
^--[CycleMetric]
 

[Metric]^-[SoftwareDesignMetric]
[SoftwareDesignMetric]^-[CouplingMetric]
